message:
feat(extension_preflight): add quarantine-to-trust promotion lifecycle (SEC-2.4)

Implement ExtensionTrustState (Quarantined/Restricted/Trusted) state machine
with operator-acknowledged promotions, risk score threshold gates, immediate
demotions, and JSONL audit trail. Add hostcall gating by trust state and
auto-quarantine from install-time risk reports. 47 new integration tests.

Closes: bd-21nj4

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
